title: Lenor Crease Release Divine Ruby Jasmine 2 X 500ML Removes Creases Iron
features: When choosing Lenor, you know that you are going to get silky soft and fresh clothes that smell wonderful and don't need to go through as much ironing. Deodorizes clothes leaving them smelling fresh.
Just like an iron in a bottle, the spray smooths away creases on your clothing and bedding to help you to better enjoy your day. Ideal for clothing and bedding, just spray and smooth away creases.

With its lush compilation of delish-smelling fruits and florals, Lenor Ruby Jasmine Scent will seduce you - feeding flamboyance and your lust for life. Its gradual fragrance release will give your clothes a noticeably luxurious Jasmine and Freesia sensation.
